explicit build and start commands.

feat(gateway): security profile enforcement middleware (CAB-1744) (#1553)

## Summary
- New `profile_enforcement` middleware enforces per-subscription
security requirements based on `SubscriptionInfo.security_profile`
- **5 profiles**: `api_key`/`oauth2_public`/`oauth2_confidential` (JWT
only), `fapi_baseline` (requires DPoP header), `fapi_advanced` (requires
DPoP + mTLS client cert)
- Prometheus metric `stoa_profile_enforcement_total` with result/profile
labels
- Wired into edge-mcp router after quota middleware layer
- Graceful skip when no `SubscriptionInfo` in extensions (non-proxied
routes)
- Unknown profiles fail-open with warning log (forward compatibility)

## Architecture
```
Request → JWT Auth → Subscription Validation → Profile Enforcement → Handler
                                                  ↑
                                          Reads SubscriptionInfo.security_profile
                                          Checks DPoP header / ClientCertInfo
```

## Test plan
- [x] 13 unit tests: all 5 profiles, missing DPoP, missing mTLS,
empty/unknown profiles
- [x] `cargo fmt --check` clean
- [x] `RUSTFLAGS=-Dwarnings cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
clean
- [x] `cargo test` — 1809 tests pass, 0 failures
- [ ] CI green

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix: settings-row-icon SVG color inherits correctly

<button> elements don't always inherit color from the cascade
like <div>/<h3> do (browsers may apply ButtonText UA style).
Explicitly set color: var(--text-primary) on .settings-row-icon
so stroke="currentColor" resolves to the same dark/light value
in both Settings (<button>) and Trends/Personal (<div>/<h3>).

commit.message:
fix: force full re-sync after STRM naming bug fix (issue #9)

SmartSkipExisting was skipping series whose provider timestamps hadn't
changed, so the StripEpisodeTitleDuplicate fix from v1.4.31 never ran
on existing files. Duplicated filenames persisted despite the fix.

Introduce StrmNamingVersion (PluginConfiguration) and
CurrentStrmNamingVersion = 1 (StrmSyncService). On first sync after
upgrade the stored value (0) is behind the constant, so both sync
timestamps are reset to 0 and the config is saved. The next full run
regenerates all STRM files with corrected names. Subsequent calls are
no-ops until the constant is bumped again.

Adds four regression tests covering the reported examples.

feat: add PieChart widget (v1.6.0 2/5)

Implemented PieChart widget with the following features:
- Circular percentage display with legend
- Three legend positions: right, bottom, none
- Percentage display toggle
- Custom slice styles and colors
- Block border integration
- Comprehensive test coverage (20 tests)

Widget API:
- init(slices) — create pie chart
- withBlock(block) — set border/title
- withLegendPosition(pos) — set legend placement
- withPercentages(bool) — toggle percentage display
- render(buf, area) — render to buffer

Test coverage:
- Initialization and builder pattern
- Legend positioning (right, bottom, none)
- Empty/zero data handling
- Block integration
- Area splitting logic
- Edge cases (small areas, single slice)

All tests passing (20 new), cross-platform builds verified.

fix: Wire homepage to CMS and fix content cache sharing

The homepage had all text hardcoded as string literals, so admin CMS
edits saved to the database but never appeared on the site. Now page.tsx
uses getContentBatch() for hero, steps, stats, and section titles.

Also moved the in-memory content cache to globalThis (matching the
Prisma pattern) so clearContentCache() called from admin API routes
properly invalidates the cache used by page renders.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add visitor nomination feature for people who already visited

New feature allows visitors to nominate contacts without authentication:

Frontend:
- Created NominatePage (/nominate) with luxury design matching verify workflow
- Form to submit up to 3 contacts (name + phone)
- Optional submitter phone field
- Created NominateSuccessPage for after submission
- Added submitVisitorNominations API function
- Added routes in App.jsx

Backend:
- Created VisitorNominationsView (POST /api/auth/visitor-nominations)
- Public endpoint (no auth required)
- Accepts submitter_phone (optional) and contacts array (max 3)
- Stores in same InvitedContact database
- Uses submitter_phone or "VISITOR" as inviter_phone
- Validates phone numbers and prevents duplicates
- Returns success message after creating nominations

Design:
- Same luxury card design as verify page
- Arabic + English invitation message
- Gold dividers and elegant styling
- Mobile-responsive form layout

Access:
- Link: /nominate (boss can share this link with previous visitors)
- No verification or authentication needed
- Merges with existing guest database
- Does not affect previous VIP booking workflow

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
fix: prevent duplicate image downloads on task source resync (#81)

Linear and Notion plugins compared full signed URLs (including query
params with tokens/expiry) for duplicate detection. Since these change
on every API call, the same files were re-downloaded on each resync.

Strip query parameters before comparison so the stable base URL path
is used for deduplication, matching how HubSpot already uses stable
file IDs.

commit.message:
Simplifier: add contract_curvature + CovD commutation, TDeriv.covd field, packaging prep

Track A - Simplifier improvements:
- Add contract_curvature to simplify pipeline (after contract_metrics, before canonicalize)
  so Riemann/Ricci traces are auto-detected after metric contraction
- Add canonicalize() inside collect_terms for better term merging
- Add optional commute_covds_name kwarg to simplify() for CovD commutation in the loop
- Update ground_truth: dS δ¹Riem 12→6 terms, Galileon EOM 20→17 terms (tighter simplification)

Track B - Multi-CovD support:
- Add TDeriv.covd field (default :partial) with backward-compatible constructor
- Metric compatibility rule now checks expr.covd (accepts CovD name or :partial)
- Propagate covd through all 17+ TDeriv reconstruction sites across the codebase
- Update show() to display CovD name instead of ∂ when tagged

Track C - Packaging prep:
- Move Symbolics from [deps] to [weakdeps] (was incorrectly in both)
- Remove LinearAlgebra compat entry (stdlib, no compat needed)
- Add NOTICE file documenting GPL xperm.c

All 2,889 tests + 135 benchmarks pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add enterprise authentication flow to the desktop app:
- Enterprise tab in Settings with login form, tenant selector, and connected status
- EnterpriseAuth main process module with Supabase auth + safeStorage encryption

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: hardcode enterprise config for all environments instead of env vars

Supabase URL, anon key, and API URL are now built into the binary:
- Production (packaged app): api.peakflo.ai + prod Supabase
- Stage: stage-api.peakflo.ai + stage Supabase
- Local (dev mode): localhost:2000 + local Supabase
- Override with ENTERPRISE_ENV=local|stage|production if needed

Anon keys are public by design (scoped by Supabase RLS policies).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: switch enterprise login to OAuth popup flow

Replace email/password form with Supabase OAuth popup:
- Opens system browser for authentication (supports OIDC providers)
- Uses LocalOAuthServer + PKCE flow (same pattern as existing OAuth)
- Exchanges auth code for Supabase session, then fetches companies
- Fix empty body error on /verify endpoint (remove Content-Type header)
- Remove email/password args from entire IPC chain
- UI shows "Sign in to 20x Cloud" button instead of form

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use Supabase OAuth Server flow instead of hardcoded provider

Follow https://supabase.com/docs/guides/auth/oauth-server/oauth-flows:
- Redirect to Supabase's /auth/v1/authorize (hosted login UI)
- Supabase decides which providers to show (Google, OIDC, SAML, etc.)
- No provider hardcoded on our side
- PKCE flow with manual code exchange via /auth/v1/token
- Removes dependency on supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: restore email/password login (Supabase uses signInWithPassword)

The Supabase project uses email/password auth (no OAuth providers configured).
Reverts the OAuth popup approach and restores the original email/password
form with the empty body bug fixed on /verify endpoint.

keeping EnterpriseSettings as a simple connected/not-connected status view.

commit.message:
fix: clear demo localStorage eagerly at init, not just teardown

Demo mode is ephemeral — stale FootageIndex/DayPack data from prior
sessions must not carry across page loads. clearDemoStorage() now runs
at initEpisodePackHook() time, which fires before any scenes resolve.
Safe for authenticated users since they never write to '.demo' keys.

fix: merge localStorage trips into authenticated fetch for PWA shared link access (#590)

When authenticated users visit shared trip links in Safari, the trip is saved
to localStorage but not returned by the DB query (which scopes to creator/participant).
After the main fetch, check localStorage for trip codes not in the result set and
fetch them individually, so they appear on the PWA home page.

Co-authored-by: Kristjan Elias <kristjanelias@Kairis-MacBook-Air.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement §12.4.2 unique-if, unique0-if, and priority-if

Add violation detection for unique/unique0 if-else-if chains:
- unique if: warn on no-match without else, warn on overlap
- unique0 if: warn on overlap only (no-match is allowed)
- priority if: unchanged (already warns on no-match)

For unique/unique0, ExecIf now walks the entire if-else-if chain
and evaluates all conditions to detect overlapping matches.
The first matching branch is always executed.

commit.message:
Add string type with lexing, parsing, evaluation, and concatenation

Add STRING token type and readString() to lexer. Add StringLiteral AST
node and parseStringLiteral(). Make Error and String distinct struct
types to avoid variant ambiguity with std::string. Support string
concatenation via + operator and report errors for other operators.
